name: Chatbot
description: AI-powered chatbot using OpenAI. Reads in-game chat and responds intelligently.

name: Animated Armour Killer &
description: Builds, Kills, and loots animated armour and warrior guild tokens.

name: MM Caves
description: Automates chinning or bursting in Monkey Madness II caves

name: Demonic Gorillas
description: Automates restocking, prayer flicking, and gear switching during Demonic Gorillas

name: Tormented Demons
description: Automates restocking, prayer flicking, and gear switching during Tormented Demon

name: Clue Solver
description: Automates solving clue scrolls by managing interactions

name: Eel Fishing
description: Automates fishing for Infernal and Sacred eels

name: Wilderness Agility
description: Automated wilderness agility training with banking and ticket collection

name: Tears of Guthix
description: Optimally complete the Tears of Guthix D&D

name: Creature Creation
description: Automates the creature creation process within the Tower of Life basement.

name: Fishing Trawler
description: Chops Tentacles in fishing trawler minigame. start the script either on the dock outside the minigame or on the upstairs ship level where the tentacles spawn. make sure you have an axe on you

name: Bones to Bananas
description: Casts Bones to Bananas, using staves to save runes.

name: Ourania Altar
description: Craft runes at the Ourania Altar

name: Rogues' Den
description: Mark tiles and clickboxes to help traverse the maze

name: Moons of Peril
description: A plugin to farm the Moons of Peril

name: Frosty Rc
description: A plugin to automate Rune crafting

name: Bank Tab Sorter
description: Sorts the current bank tab  using an advanced heuristic algorithm

name: Tzhaar Venator
description: Automatically kills Tzhaars with the Venator Bow

name: Stone Chest Thiever
description: A plugin to automate thieving from stone chests in the Lizardman Temple.

name: Gem Crab Killer
description: Automatically kills the Gem Crab boss

name: Lunar Tanner
description: Tans hides on the lunar spellbook

name: Chaos Altar
description: Automates bone offering at the Chaos Altar

name: MotherlodeMine
description: A bot that mines paydirt in the motherlode mine

name: Deadfall Trap Hunter
description: Automates hunting all creatures with Deadfall traps

name: Theatre of Blood Overlay
description: All-in-one plugin providing overlays and helpers for every Theatre of Blood room.

name: Varrock Anvil
description: Smith items at the anvils in Varrock West.

name: Farm tree runner
description: Acun's farm tree runner. Supports regular, fruit and hardwood trees

name: Volcanic Ash Miner
description: Start either at the ash mine on Fossil Island or with a digsite pendant in your inventory. Have a pickaxe in your inventory or equipped.

name: Kitten Tracker
description: Automates the kitten growth process and provides notifications

name: Construction 2
description: Geoff's Microbot construction plugin with added new bits.

name: Barb Village Fisher
description: Fly and bait fish in Barbarian Village.

name: Amethyst Miner
description: Automates mining amethyst in the mining guild

name: Combat hotkeys
description: A plugin to bind hotkeys to combat stuff

name: Clan Recruiter
description: Recruits people at GE to your clan

name: GE Buyer
description: Acun's GE buyer. Give a list of items to buy

name: The Mess
description: A plugin to automate cooking in The Mess hall.

name: Bank Stander
description: AIO bank standing plugin for various processing activities

name: Bank Seller
description: Withdraws tradeable bank items and sells them on the Grand Exchange

name: Player Monitor
description: Monitors nearby players and executes emergency actions when detected.

name: Bradley Combat
description: A plugin for managing combat swaps, special attacks, prayer toggles, and food/potion actions via hotkeys.

name: Zulrah Overlay Helper
description: Helps with various aspects during a fight with Zulrah

description: Enchants all types of jewellery, with smart staff & rune handling.

name: Royal Titans
description: Kills the Royal Titans boss with another bot

name: Delve Prayer Helper
description: Automatically prays against the Delve boss attacks

name: MTA
description: Automates the Mage Training Arena minigame

name: GE Cooker
description: Cooks items on fires found at the Grand Exchange.

name: NPC Tanner
description: Tans any hide in the bank at Al-Kharid

name: AI-Wintertodt
description: Advanced Wintertodt bot with human-like behavior

name: Vale Totems
description: Automated Vale Totems minigame bot with advanced optimizations

name: Blessed Wine
description: Automating Prayer Training using blessed wines at Cam Torum

name: Sulphur Nagua Fighter
description: Automatically fights Sulphur Naguas in Varlamore, handling potions and combat.

name: Fishing
description: Automated fishing plugin with banking support

name: Jad Helper
description: Auto prays jad attacks and attacks healers

name: Slayer
description: Automated slayer with banking and travel support

name: Tithe Farm
description: Plays the Tithe farm minigame for you!

description: Automatically hunts herbiboars with trail tracking and banking support

name: Pest Control
description: Supports all boats, portals, and shields.

description: Uses logs on campfires around the Grand Exchange.
